TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 24 a romi'ad masofoc ci Hashim Thaçi , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Kosovo anini i ci Hashim Thaçi, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi ħasħim tħa*i , maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u ko~uso~ub~vo~u anini i ʦi ħasħim tħa*i, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 24 a romi'ad masofoc ci Hashim Thaçi , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Kosovo anini i ci Hashim Thaçi, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi ħasħim tħa*i , maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u ko~uso~ub~vo~u anini i ʦi ħasħim tħa*i, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
